title: Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates:
Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates!
